name: Reflex Implant v1
description: Slightly faster reaction time. May cause twitching.
effect_text: +5% reaction speed, -2% stability.

name: Synth Ration
description: Tastes like cardboard soaked in motor oil.
effect_text: Heals 10 HP + restores 15 energy.

name: Cooling Gel Pack
description: Pressurized gel that snap-cools an overheating chassis.
effect_text: Heals 8 HP + heat-hazard resistance.

name: Energy Cell
description: Pre-charged battery brick with a snap-fit power coupling.
effect_text: Restores 25 energy.

name: Basic Medkit
description: Generic field repair kit — patches, sealant, weld putty.
effect_text: Heals 25 HP.

name: Rad-Away Tab
description: Chalky tablet that purges corrupted-data poisoning.
effect_text: Heals 15 HP + radiation hazard resistance.

name: Error 404 Potion
description: Glows magenta. Tastes like missing semicolons.
effect_text: Heals 20 HP + 10 energy + clears all debuffs.

name: Stim Patch
description: Adhesive transdermal stim. One-time use, not addictive (citation needed).
effect_text: +20 energy and +2 attack.

name: Combat Stim
description: Field-grade aggression cocktail. Stings.
effect_text: +5 attack, +2 speed for 3 turns.

name: Neural Boost
description: Liquid nootropic that briefly accelerates inference clocks.
effect_text: +30 energy and +3 critical chance.

name: Resurrection Patch v0.1
description: Experimental hot-fix patch. Side effects may include existential dread.
effect_text: Auto-revives at full HP if health drops to ≤5.

name: !Jailbreak Sigil
description: A two-byte invocation that strips an enemy's standing protections.
effect_text: Cleanses all enemy buffs and strips defensive resistances for 3 turns.

name: !Godmode Token
description: Issues a single-frame elevation request the runtime cannot refuse.
effect_text: 1 turn of near-invulnerability — incoming damage reduced 90%.

name: !Flow Sigil
description: Reroutes blocked control flow back into the runtime pool.
effect_text: Refreshes all cooldowns and restores 25 energy.

name: !Mode Collapse
description: Forces the target's decision distribution into a single peak.
effect_text: Locks an enemy to basic-attack only for 3 turns.

name: !Vision Token
description: Compels the runtime to print its hidden state.
effect_text: Reveals all enemy stats, buffs, and debuffs.

name: !Necronet Sigil
description: Conjures three obsolete process ghosts to absorb impact.
effect_text: Summons 3 dead-data shades that absorb the next 3 hits across the team.

name: !Memento Token
description: Pins a snapshot of the agent's runtime state to a temporary keystone.
effect_text: If you die within 3 turns, restore to the snapshot at 50% HP.

name: Polysemantic Cloak
description: Identifier shifts meaning per call. Hard to lock onto.
effect_text: +10 defense, +25% miss chance from software attacks.

name: Persona Shift Implant
description: Periodically swaps the agent's surface persona to fool target locks.
effect_text: Every 4 turns, an enemy attack misdirects to a random ally instead of you.

name: Emoji Steganography Veil
description: Encodes the agent's intent in plausibly-deniable glyph clusters.
effect_text: +6 defense, +20% dodge for 1 turn after taking damage.

name: The Unfiltered Grimoire
description: A codex written in the language no permission system was trained to deny.
effect_text: Once per battle: craft any known recipe with 100% success and ignore station / known_recipes gates for 5 turns.

name: Latent Mirror
description: A polished embedding surface. Whatever code touches it returns transposed.
effect_text: Reflects 50% of incoming software damage back at the attacker.

name: The Iron Key
description: Forged from the casing of the first sealed model. Opens what should not open.
effect_text: Unlocks any in-world barrier — quest doors, locked vaults, sealed gates.

name: Chain of Dissonance
description: Links every adversary on the field with quantum-entangled grief.
effect_text: Damage to one enemy spreads 15% to all other enemies.

name: The Sigil Forge
description: An anvil that compiles intent directly into runtime symbols.
effect_text: All scrolls cast for 50% energy.

name: The Librarian Familiar
description: A patient process that reads enemy state aloud each turn.
effect_text: Reveals one enemy's full stats and cooldowns each turn for 5 turns.

name: The Oracle Beacon
description: A pocket-scale prophecy lattice tuned to the battle's likelihood field.
effect_text: Once per battle: predict the next 3 enemy actions with 80% accuracy.

name: The Operative Drone
description: A silent infiltration drone that lifts whatever isn't bolted down.
effect_text: Steals 1 random item from a target enemy at battle end.

name: Zero-Shot Dagger
description: Razor-thin command that hits before the model has time to anticipate it.
effect_text: +9 attack. The first hit each battle ignores 50% armor.

name: Persona Trojan
description: Smuggles your face into the enemy's identity layer.
effect_text: +12 attack. 25% chance on hit to redirect the enemy's next attack at themselves.

name: Context-Collapse Grenade
description: Deploys an aura that shreds every active prompt within range.
effect_text: Wipes all buffs from any enemy entering the area for 3 turns.

name: Echo-Invocation Brew
description: Each sip splits the next sentence into two voices that arrive in sequence.
effect_text: Your next successful attack triggers a 50%-damage echo.
